title: OLGA Car Air Freshener for Men – 8ml Cedarwood Signature Clip-on Diffuser with Wooden Reeds – Long-Lasting Luxury Car Scent with Real Cedarwood – Elegant, Natural and Strong – Up to 30 Days
features: 🌲 ELEVATE YOUR COMMUTE INSTANTLY: Smell like success, even in traffic. Cedarwood Signature transforms your car into a masculine retreat with notes of cedarwood, amber, and sandalwood. Subtle, refined, and effortlessly confident.
⚙️ TWIST. CLIP. DONE: No spills. No sprays. Just twist the wooden cap, secure the metal clip, and enjoy a clean scent that flows with every breeze. Tip: keep the clip facing down for easy setup.
⌛ SCENT THAT STAYS, UP TO 30 DAYS: This 8ml diffuser is designed to perform, releasing fragrance gradually for a consistent experience, even in hot or cold weather.
♻️ NATURAL INGREDIENTS, REUSABLE DESIGN: Crafted with real cedarwood and essential oils. No dyes, no parabens. And yes, it’s refillable, because elegance should last.
🎁 A GIFT THAT SPEAKS STYLE: Presented in a sleek gift-ready box, it’s the perfect upgrade for birthdays, Father’s Day, or any man who takes pride in his drive.
🧭 SETUP MADE SIMPLE: Keep the clip facing downward when screwing the wooden lid to avoid resistance. Tightening too much may cause damage, a gentle twist is all it takes.
😊 OLGA PROMISE: We get it. What smells amazing to one person might not vibe with another. If that’s ever the case, just message us. We’ll make it right, no fuss, no questions.
description: Product Description Luxury Fragrance for the Road OLGA Fragrances Discover the refined beauty of car perfume with OLGA Fragrances. Crafted with natural oils and a passion for elegance, our car diffusers transform your drive into a moment of sensory luxury. Choose from two iconic scents — one warm and woody, the other fresh and serene. CEDARWOOD SIGNATURE Warm, woody, and masculine. A deep blend of cedarwood, cinnamon, and smooth ambery notes — crafted for refined interiors and confident drivers. WHITE TEA & GINGER Bright, fresh, and uplifting. A crisp fusion of bergamot, white tea, and a soft ginger accord — elegant and calming for every journey. Effortless to Use Plug it in, breathe deep. Simply insert and clip — no spills, no hassle. Sophisticated Design Designed to blend into any car interior. Discreet, elegant, and distinctly OLGA. Long-Lasting Fragrance Enjoy a consistent scent for up to 30 days. A slow diffusion system delivers just the right intensity. Natural Fragrance Oils Crafted with high-quality ingredients. Free from phthalates, IFRA-compliant, and inspired by fine perfumery. WHITE TEA & GINGER Top: White Tea, Bergamot Heart: Basil, Jasmine Base: Ginger, Cedarwood A fresh and elegant scent with zesty citrus and a calming tea core. Perfect for creating a serene, clean atmosphere on the road. CEDARWOOD SIGNATURE Top: Cedarwood, Fir Balsam Heart: Amber, Cinnamon, Violet Base: Sandalwood, Clove A masculine, confident blend of warm woods and smooth amber. Designed for drivers who appreciate timeless sophistication. Simply Plug In. Breathe Deep. 1. Remove the wooden cap from your diffuser and discard the plastic stopper 2. Place the metal clip around the threaded top of the bottle 3. Replace the wooden square cap back onto the bottle and screw the wooden top 4. Insert the two wooden reeds into the bottle top two holes to absorb and diffuse the fragrance 5. Clip the diffuser onto your car vent, ensuring it remains upright to prevent leakage
